exemplar.title: What role does imagination play in producing knowledge about the world?

detailedExemplarData.title: What role does imagination play in producing knowledge about the world?

strengths: Clear selection of IA Prompt 30 and focus on imagination in knowledge production
Explicit real-world contexts for two objects (academic article with publication details; personally owned childhood toy with photograph)
Use of scholarly references with at least one well-formatted citation (Onol)
Historically rich TOK link via KekulÃ©âs dream demonstrates understanding of imaginationâs role
Authentic personal engagement shown through the plush toy example
weaknesses: Generic stock image for benzene and imprecise real-world context weakens Object 1
Commentary often remains descriptive, repetitive and lacks deeper TOK terminology (e.g., ways of knowing)
Some claims asserted rather than critically analysed; limited explicit engagement with knowledge frameworks
Inconsistent reference formatting and incomplete citations (e.g., Kognity, Mejbahul Alam)
Conclusion and some paragraphs are cut off or disjointed, reducing overall clarity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets the criteria for the lower end of the 5â6 band: three distinct objects are presented with links to the role of imagination, and two of the contexts and images are clearly articulated. The explanations show some evidence and TOK connection (Kantâs productive imagination, cognitive flexibility, social knowledge via play). However, the benzene example lacks a specific artefact and detailed context, the analysis often remains at a descriptive level, and there is inconsistent use of TOK terminology and citation conventions. These strengths and weaknesses align with a mark of 5 out of 10.

annotations.comment: The student uses a generic stock image for benzene. A specific artefact (e.g., a labeled museum sample or a photographed experiment setup) would strengthen the real-world context.
The explanation of benzeneâs context (âWe studied benzene in my IB chemistry HL classâ) is too general. Specify a particular experiment or demonstration to clarify its real-world relevance.
The recounting of KekulÃ©âs dream is a strong historical TOK link. To deepen analysis, explain how this example reveals the limits of empirical methods alone.
The final sentence in this paragraph is cut off, reducing clarity. Complete the thought to explicitly tie KekulÃ©âs visualization back to âproducing knowledge.â
This paragraph reiterates earlier points about imagination and discovery. Consider consolidating to reduce repetition and focusing on new insights.
This is a thorough summary of imaginationâs scientific role, but it lacks TOK terminology (e.g., âways of knowing,â âknowledge frameworkâ). Integrate those terms to sharpen the link.
When introducing Bergenâs study, specify the experimental setting (e.g., lab observations, sample size) to strengthen the objectâs real-world context.
The caption for Image 2 is precise, including author and date. This supports a clear real-world link.
When discussing Kantâs âproductive imagination,â explicitly connect it back to Prompt 30 language (âproducing knowledgeâ) to maintain focus.
This paragraph effectively outlines cognitive benefits but stops short of linking these to knowledge acquisition processes. Elaborate on that connection.
The conclusion of Object 2 reasserts previous points. Include a critical perspective or counterclaim (e.g., when imagination misleads) to deepen analysis.
The header âObject 3: My purple panda plush toyâ clearly identifies the third artefact with personal context.
Including a photo of your own toy adds authenticity and grounds the exhibition in your real-world experience.
When you state âIn childhood, we exploreâ¦,â specify when (age range) and where (home, classroom) to clarify the toyâs real-world context.
Your personal example effectively shows imaginationâs role in social knowledge. Consider connecting this explicitly to âknowledge frameworks.â
The citation for Mejbahul Alam is incomplete and the sentence is cut off. Provide the full reference and complete your analysis of his argument.
The first sentence on this page continues a previous thought and disrupts flow. Merge with the preceding page to improve coherence.
The claim that âmany children have acquired social and emotional knowledgeâ is broad. Support with evidence or a reference to avoid unsupported assertions.
The bibliography heading is clear, but the reference style varies. Adopt one consistent format (MLA or APA) for all entries.
The Kognity citation lacks an author and publication date. Include these details and a retrieval date for completeness.
The Onol citation is well-formatted and includes DOI, setting a good standard for scholarly references.
Ensure web URLs in other entries are presented uniformly (e.g., include âAccessed DD Month YYYYâ) and italicize site names consistently.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
